text: iron. Lactose intolerance : Disorder resulting from improper digestion of milk sugar called lactose, due to lack of an enzyme, lactase, in the intestinal mucosa. Linoleic acid : Fatty acid containing 18 carbon atoms and two double bonds. The first double bond is on the sixth carbon atom from the methyl end. Therefore it is called n-6 fatty acid and is abbreviated as 18:2 n-6. Lipids : A technical term for fats. They are important dietary constituents. The group includes triglycerides, steroids, cholesterol and other complex lipids. Lipoproteins : Lipids are not soluble in blood; they are therefore transported as lipid and protein complexes. Low-density lipoproteins (LDL) : These transport cholesterol from the liver to tissues. High blood levels indicate that more cholesterol is being
